summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CSR Conclave 2026 landing page. All major functionality working correctly including hero section, navbar navigation, pricing cards with UPI buttons, FAQ accordion, contact information, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with AIIF logo, event title, countdown timer, and CTA button
Event poster displays in gold frame
Navbar with all navigation links (Vision, Pricing, Register, FAQ, Contact) and Book Now button
Vision section with Tamil quote 'Yathum Oore Yavarum Kelir' and stats (150+, 20+, 1)
Pricing section shows 3 cards with correct prices (₹2,999, ₹2,499, ₹499)
UPI Pay buttons are clickable and functional
Registration section with Google Form external link working
FAQ accordion with all 7 questions expanding/collapsing correctly
Contact footer with correct email (info@aiif.in), phone (+91 8925889316), website (www.aiif.in)
Countdown timer displays days, hours, minutes, seconds
Mobile responsiveness - hamburger menu works, sections stack properly
Navigation anchor links scroll to correct sections
